authors: Kayli Plotner Patrick Ferrucci a PhD Student in Journalism Studies
raw_title: The Harming and the Helping: Perceived Organizational Effects on Mental Health in the Newsroom
title_en: The Harming and the Helping: Perceived Organizational Effects on Mental Health in the Newsroom
title_zh: 伤害与帮助：新闻编辑室中组织对心理健康的影响感知
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了新闻编辑室中的组织因素如何影响记者的心理健康。它关注哪些组织行为可能对心理健康产生负面影响，哪些可能提供支持。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how organizational factors in newsrooms affect journalists' mental health. It looks at which organizational behaviors might harm mental health and which might help support it.
research_direction_zh: 研究新闻媒体行业中的组织心理学和职场健康，特别关注压力环境下的员工福祉。
research_direction_en: Research on organizational psychology and workplace wellbeing in the news media industry, with particular focus on employee welfare in high-stress environments.
